outreach.subject: terst — quick question
outreach.text:
Hello terst team,

Quick question — who handles new patient inquiry follow-ups at terst?

I install a simple follow-up engine for forms + missed calls so more inquiries turn into booked appointments:
• instant confirmation (under 60 seconds)
• a short follow-up sequence (day 1 / day 3)
• optional review requests after visits (24h + 72h)

If you’re open to it, I can send a one-page plan based on your website — tailored and concrete.

Should I send it?

Sincerely,
Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation

asyncReplyIfInterested.subject: Re: terst — perfect (we can do this async)
asyncReplyIfInterested.text:
Hello terst team,

Perfect — we can do this fully async (no call needed).

Reply with ONE letter and I’ll tailor the exact setup + messages to match your intake:
A) Website forms
B) Missed calls
C) Both + review requests

Optional (helps me tailor fast): send your booking link.

Sincerely,
Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation

followupDay1.subject: Re: terst — quick follow-up
followupDay1.text:
Hello terst team,

Quick follow-up — want me to send the one-page plan?

Reply A / B / C:
A) Forms
B) Missed calls
C) Both + reviews

Sincerely,
Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation

followupDay3.subject: Re: terst — should I close this?
followupDay3.text:
Hello terst team,

Last note from me — if this isn’t a priority right now, no worries.

If you want the one-page plan, reply A / B / C:
A) Forms
B) Missed calls
C) Both + reviews

Sincerely,
Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation
